message:
feat: add selection copy/rect extraction, migrate to AHashMap, and optimize render pipeline

Three distinct improvements across the frankenterm-core and ftui workspace:

Selection text extraction (frankenterm-core/selection.rs, +477 lines):
- Add CopyOptions controlling combining marks, trailing whitespace trimming,
  and soft-wrap joining behavior
- Add Selection::extract_copy() for linear text extraction from grid+scrollback
- Add Selection::extract_rect() for rectangular/block column selection
- Handle wide characters (CJK dedup), Unicode combining marks, soft-wrap joining
- Comprehensive test suite with 25+ tests covering edge cases
- Add selection_state.rs module

AHashMap migration across 8 crates:
- Replace std HashMap with ahash::AHashMap in s3_fifo cache index, grapheme_pool,
  link_registry, spatial_hit_index, stylesheet, focus graph/manager, measure_cache,
  and notification_queue for improved hash performance
- Add ahash and arc-swap dependencies to ftui-core, ftui-render, ftui-style,
  ftui-widgets Cargo.toml files
- Add AHashMap parity test and hashmap benchmark

Render pipeline zero-alloc optimizations:
- Add 3-buffer rotation in terminal_writer to avoid per-frame Buffer::clone()
- Add runs_into() reusing pre-allocated Vec<ChangeRun> instead of allocating
- Add #[inline(always)] on Cell::bits_eq and scan_row_changes_range for
  SIMD auto-vectorization
- Add compile-time assertions for 64-byte cache line alignment
- Add CacheLineBlock repr(C, align(64)) documentation
- Add bench_diff_cells_per_second throughput benchmark
- Add proptest invariants for runs/runs_into isomorphism and capacity reuse
- Add proptest_nonoverlap_invariants for layout engine
- Add proptest_measurable_invariants for widget measurement
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ caps-probe = []
 test-helpers = []
 
 [dependencies]
+ahash = "0.8"
 arc-swap = "1.8.2"
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 unicode-display-width = "0.3.0"

@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing", "dep:tracing"]
 unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ["cfg(coverage)", "cfg(coverage_nightly)"] }
 
 [dependencies]
+ahash = "0.8"
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-style"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
+ahash = "0.8"
 arc-swap = "1.8.2"
 ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
 tracing = "0.1.41"

@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ state-persistence = ["dep:serde"]
 tracing = ["dep:tracing", "ftui-render/tracing"]
 
 [dependencies]
+ahash = "0.8"
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout", version = "0.1.1" }
@@ -41,3 +42,7 @@ tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.20", features = ["registry"] }
 [[bench]]
 name = "widget_bench"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "hashmap_bench"
+harness = false
